title: Uravappara Temple
tagline: Uravappara Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Sree Subramanya Swami Temple, also known by the name 'Malayala Palani' (Palani of Kerala), is located in Olamattom near Thodupuzha in Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Sree Subramanya Swami Temple, also known by the name 'Malayala Palani' (Palani of Kerala), is located in Olamattom near Thodupuzha in Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is situated at a height of 500 ft (150 m) above mean sea level. Lord Muruga presides there in the form 'Bala Subramanya'. The legend has it that the idol here is a self-born one.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Karimannoor
topPlaces.description: Karimannoor is a panchayat of India; earlier it was a Legislative Constitutancy, belonging to Thodupuzha Taluk in Idukki District, Kerala, India. The main occupation of the population is agriculture, predominantly of natural rubber.

topPlaces.name: Neyyassery
topPlaces.description: Neyyassery is a village in Karimannoor Panchayat in Thodupuzha Taluk of Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala. Neyyassery's registered population was 7,557 per the 2011 census, compared to the population of 7,610 in 2001; the population of the village decreased in that 10 years.

topPlaces.name: Chilavu
topPlaces.description: Chilavu is a small village in Thodupuzha Taluk. It lies in the Idukki district of Kerala, South India.

topPlaces.name: Kannadi
topPlaces.description: Kannadi is a gram panchayat in the Palakkad district, state of Kerala, India. The third Lulu Mall in Kerala, Lulu International Shopping Mall, Palakkad is located in Kannadi.

topPlaces.name: St. Thomas More Syro-Malabar Church, Alakode
topPlaces.description: St. Thomas More Syro-Malabar Church, Alakode is a parish of the Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, located in Kalayanthani, Idukki district, Kerala.

image.alt: St. Thomas More Syro-Malabar Church, Alakode

topPlaces.name: Muthalakodam
topPlaces.description: Muthalakodam is a suburb located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) east of Thodupuzha Town, in Idukki district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kaliyar
topPlaces.description: Kaliyar is a small village in the Idukki district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kattadikkadavu
topPlaces.description: Kattadikkadavu is a hillock and trekking spot located in Vannapuram panchayat near Thodupuzha in Idukki district, Kerala, India. It is also located 34 km from Muvattupuzha in Ernakulam district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Uravappara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Uravappara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Uravappara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Uravappara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Uravappara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Uravappara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Uravappara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Uravappara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karimannoor, Neyyassery, Chilavu, Kannadi, St. Thomas More Syro-Malabar Church, Alakode.
